name: Send a chat message and receive an agent reply
description: When the user types a message in the Agent tab input field and clicks the send button, the message appears in the chat as a user message and the agent responds (either with a reply or a rate-limit message).

planSteps.description: Click the third tab in the bottom dock to open the Agent view
Verify the chat interface is visible with an input field at the bottom
Click inside the chat input field and type a short message like 'hello'
Click the send button (the button with an arrow-up icon next to the input)
Verify the user message appears in the chat area as a sent message bubble
Verify the agent produces some kind of response (a reply message or an error/rate-limit notice) within a reasonable time
